objective: Harden enochWIKI type-safety and lock in the verification gates: drive `tsc --noEmit` to clean across the real app surface (behavior-preserving fixes only), add a `typecheck` script, and tighten scripts/check.sh to enforce it. Flipping next.config.ts `typescript.ignoreBuildErrors` to false is owner-gated and stays BLOCKED.

items.description: Fix the `src/app/page.tsx:257` type error: a `boolean | null` value is passed where the prop expects `boolean | undefined`. Coalesce null to undefined (or narrow the type) without changing runtime behavior.
steps: bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'src/app/page.tsx'  # confirm the error + read line 257 for context.
Read src/app/page.tsx around line 257; map the value's source (likely a nullable state/field).
Make it `boolean | undefined` at the call site (e.g. `value ?? undefined`) or fix the upstream type ŌĆö no behavior change, no logic change.
bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'src/app/page.tsx'  # MUST be empty now.
bash scripts/check.sh must end ALL GATES PASS.
items.regression_notes: Behavior-preserving only. tsc is not yet a gate (EW-004 adds it), so verify this item with the targeted grep AND keep check.sh (lint+build) green.

items.description: Fix the `src/app/api/flashcards/route.ts:98` type error: argument inferred as `never` (a Prisma `create`/`update` data shape mismatch). Align the data object to the Prisma model type without changing what the route does.
steps: bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'src/app/api/flashcards/route.ts'  # confirm + read line 98.
Read the route; compare the object passed at :98 to the Flashcard model in prisma/schema.prisma.
Type the argument correctly (e.g. `Prisma.FlashcardCreateInput`/`...UpdateInput`, or fix the offending field) ŌĆö preserve the existing fields/behavior.
bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'src/app/api/flashcards/route.ts'  # MUST be empty.
bash scripts/check.sh must end ALL GATES PASS.
items.regression_notes: Do NOT touch prisma/schema.prisma or migrations here ŌĆö fix the TS at the call site only. Behavior-preserving.

items.description: Stop `tsc` from typechecking non-app dev scripts and examples (which redeclare globals / reference optional, uninstalled deps). Exclude `scripts/**` and `examples/**` from tsconfig.json ŌĆö mirroring eslint.config.mjs, which already ignores `examples/**`. These files are run ad-hoc via `bunx tsx`, never compiled by Next.
steps: bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E '^(scripts|examples)/'  # see the script/example noise.
Read tsconfig.json; add `scripts/**` and `examples/**` to the `exclude` array (keep `node_modules`).
bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1  # should now report ONLY app errors already fixed by EW-001/002 ŌĆö ideally clean.
Confirm Next still builds (scripts/examples were never part of the build): bash scripts/check.sh must end ALL GATES PASS.
items.regression_notes: Excluding from tsconfig only changes what tsc/the editor checks; it does not change runtime, the build, or how `bunx tsx scripts/*.ts` runs. Do not delete the script files.

items.description: With the app surface clean (EW-001..003), add a `typecheck` script (`tsc --noEmit`) to package.json and wire a strict typecheck gate into scripts/check.sh (before the build step). This makes type regressions fail the gate.
steps: Confirm prerequisite: bunx tsc --noEmit  # MUST exit 0 (clean). If not, the prior items are not done ŌĆö STOP, do not force this item.
Add `"typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"` to package.json scripts (match the existing JSON style).

Edit scripts/check.sh: add a `step "typecheck (tsc --noEmit)"` running `bun run typecheck` (FAIL -> rc=1), placed before the build step; update the header comment that currently says tsc is NOT a gate.
bash scripts/check.sh must end ALL GATES PASS (now including typecheck).
items.regression_notes: This tightens the gate. After this lands, EVERY later iteration's check.sh enforces a clean tsc. Keep the gate ordering cheap-before-expensive (typecheck before build).

items.description: Flip `typescript.ignoreBuildErrors` from `true` to `false` in next.config.ts so the production `next build` itself enforces types (defence-in-depth over the EW-004 gate).
steps: BLOCKED ŌĆö do not start. Requires owner OK: flipping this changes build-failure semantics and could break `bun run build` / deploys if any type error remains anywhere the build compiles.

When unblocked: ensure `bun run typecheck` is green (EW-004 landed), set `ignoreBuildErrors: false`, run a full `bash scripts/check.sh`, and confirm the standalone build still emits before committing.
items.regression_notes: Owner-gated build-policy change. Never flip in a local-only iteration without explicit owner approval.
